pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["对于 Ubuntu 不再支持的版本，请参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../ubuntu-old-releases/","children":"Ubuntu 旧版本帮助"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["在 Ubuntu 24.04 之前，Ubuntu 的软件源配置文件使用传统的 One-Line-Style，路径为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}],"；从 Ubuntu 24.04 开始，Ubuntu 的软件源配置文件变更为 DEB822 格式，路径为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/ubuntu.sources"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"将系统自带的对应文件做个备份，然后根据格式的选择下面对应的内容替换，即可使用选择的软件源镜像。"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"传统格式etcaptsourceslist","children":["传统格式（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}],"）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Ubuntu 版本","items":[["Ubuntu 24.04 LTS",{"release":"noble"}],["Ubuntu 25.04",{"release":"plucky"}],["Ubuntu 24.10",{"release":"oracular"}],["Ubuntu 22.04",{"release":"jammy"}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"启用 proposed","name":"proposed","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"强制安全更新使用镜像","note":"为了更及时地获得安全更新，不推荐使用镜像站安全更新软件源","name":"mirror_security","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false}],"templateId":"template-0","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"deb822-格式etcaptsourceslistdubuntusources","children":["DEB822 格式（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/ubuntu.sources"}],"）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Ubuntu 版本","items":[["Ubuntu 24.04 LTS",{"release_deb822":"noble"}],["Ubuntu 25.04",{"release_deb822":"plucky"}],["Ubuntu 24.10",{"release_deb822":"oracular"}],["Ubuntu 22.04",{"release_deb822":"jammy"}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"启用 proposed","name":"proposed","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"强制安全更新使用镜像","note":"为了更及时地获得安全更新，不推荐使用镜像站安全更新软件源","name":"mirror_security","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false}],"templateId":"template-1","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/ubuntu.sources","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"因镜像站同步有延迟，可能会导致生产环境系统不能及时检查、安装上最新的安全更新，不建议替换 security 源。"}]]}]
